title: [Receipt for $250.00 as payment for Cate, an enslaved woman, Nov. 7, 1834?]
note: Individual receipt/bill-of-sale primary source recovered via LoC search. WPA Federal Writers' Project slave narratives, 1936-1938. ~2,300 first-person interviews with formerly enslaved people. Each narrative names former owners, plantations, locations. Critical Black-ancestry evidence stream. Top-level metadata only here; specific narrative texts fetched on-demand by extractor.
